simple_types.name: CFG0_DST_H2SEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CFG0_DST_H2SEL_Field is
   SW,
   HW)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: SW
enumeration_literals.description: Hardware handshaking interface is used to trigger a transfer request.

simple_types.name: CFG0_FIFOCFG_Field
simple_types.code:
type CFG0_FIFOCFG_Field is
   ALAP_CFG,
   HALF_CFG,
   ASAP_CFG)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: ALAP_CFG
enumeration_literals.description:
When half FIFO size is available/filled, a source/destination request is
serviced.

enumeration_literals.name: HALF_CFG
enumeration_literals.description:
When there is enough space/data available to perform a single AHB access,
then the request is serviced.

simple_types.name: CFG0_LOCK_B_Field
CFG0_LOCK_IF_Field
simple_types.code:
type CFG0_LOCK_IF_Field is
   DISABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: DISABLE
enumeration_literals.description: Interface Lock capability is enabled

simple_types.name: CFG0_LOCK_IF_L_Field
simple_types.code:
type CFG0_LOCK_IF_L_Field is
   CHUNK,
   BUFFER)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: CHUNK
enumeration_literals.description:
The Master Interface Arbiter is locked by the channel x for a buffer
transfer.

simple_types.name: CFG0_SOD_Field
simple_types.code:
type CFG0_SOD_Field is
   DISABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: DISABLE
enumeration_literals.description:
STOP ON DONE activated, the DMAC module is automatically disabled if DONE
FIELD is set to 1.

simple_types.name: CFG0_SRC_H2SEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CFG0_SRC_H2SEL_Field is
   SW,
   HW)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: SW
enumeration_literals.description: Hardware handshaking interface is used to trigger a transfer request.

simple_types.name: CTRLA0_DCSIZE_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLA0_DCSIZE_Field is
   CHK_1,
   CHK_4,
   CHK_8,
   CHK_16)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: CHK_1
enumeration_literals.description: 4 data transferred

enumeration_literals.name: CHK_4
enumeration_literals.description: 8 data transferred

enumeration_literals.name: CHK_8
enumeration_literals.description: 16 data transferred

simple_types.name: CTRLA0_DST_WIDTH_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLA0_DST_WIDTH_Field is
   BYTE,
   HALF_WORD,
   WORD)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: BYTE
enumeration_literals.description: the transfer size is set to 16-bit width

enumeration_literals.name: HALF_WORD
enumeration_literals.description: the transfer size is set to 32-bit width

simple_types.name: CTRLA0_SCSIZE_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLA0_SCSIZE_Field is
   CHK_1,
   CHK_4,
   CHK_8,
   CHK_16)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: CHK_1
enumeration_literals.description: 4 data transferred

enumeration_literals.name: CHK_4
enumeration_literals.description: 8 data transferred

enumeration_literals.name: CHK_8
enumeration_literals.description: 16 data transferred

simple_types.name: CTRLA0_SRC_WIDTH_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLA0_SRC_WIDTH_Field is
   BYTE,
   HALF_WORD,
   WORD)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: BYTE
enumeration_literals.description: the transfer size is set to 16-bit width

enumeration_literals.name: HALF_WORD
enumeration_literals.description: the transfer size is set to 32-bit width

simple_types.name: CTRLB0_DST_DSCR_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB0_DST_DSCR_Field is
   FETCH_FROM_MEM,
   FETCH_DISABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: FETCH_FROM_MEM
enumeration_literals.description: Buffer Descriptor Fetch operation is disabled for the destination.

simple_types.name: CTRLB0_DST_INCR_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB0_DST_INCR_Field is
   INCREMENTING,
   DECREMENTING,
   FIXED)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: INCREMENTING
enumeration_literals.description: The destination address is decremented

enumeration_literals.name: DECREMENTING
enumeration_literals.description: The destination address remains unchanged

simple_types.name: CTRLB0_FC_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB0_FC_Field is
   MEM2MEM_DMA_FC,
   MEM2PER_DMA_FC,
   PER2MEM_DMA_FC,
   PER2PER_DMA_FC)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: MEM2MEM_DMA_FC
enumeration_literals.description: Memory-to-Peripheral Transfer DMAC is flow controller

enumeration_literals.name: MEM2PER_DMA_FC
enumeration_literals.description: Peripheral-to-Memory Transfer DMAC is flow controller

enumeration_literals.name: PER2MEM_DMA_FC
enumeration_literals.description: Peripheral-to-Peripheral Transfer DMAC is flow controller

simple_types.name: CTRLB0_SRC_DSCR_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB0_SRC_DSCR_Field is
   FETCH_FROM_MEM,
   FETCH_DISABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: FETCH_FROM_MEM
enumeration_literals.description: Buffer Descriptor Fetch operation is disabled for the source.

simple_types.name: CTRLB0_SRC_INCR_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRLB0_SRC_INCR_Field is
   INCREMENTING,
   DECREMENTING,
   FIXED)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: INCREMENTING
enumeration_literals.description: The source address is decremented

enumeration_literals.name: DECREMENTING
enumeration_literals.description: The source address remains unchanged

simple_types.name: GCFG_ARB_CFG_Field
simple_types.code:
type GCFG_ARB_CFG_Field is
   FIXED,
   ROUND_ROBIN)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: FIXED
enumeration_literals.description: Modified round robin arbiter.

simple_types.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type WPMR_WPKEY_Field is
   WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 24;

enumeration_literals.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation of the
WPEN bit.Always reads as 0.

fields.name: SREQ
fields.description: DMAC Software Chunk Transfer Request Register

fields.name: CREQ
fields.description: DMAC Software Last Transfer Flag Register

fields.name: LAST
fields.description:
DMAC Error, Chained Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt and Buffer
Transfer Completed Interrupt Enable register.

fields.name: EBCIER

DMAC Error, Chained Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt and Buffer
Transfer Completed Interrupt Disable register.

fields.name: EBCIDR
fields.description:
DMAC Error, Chained Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt and Buffer
transfer completed Mask Register.

fields.name: EBCIMR

DMAC Error, Chained Buffer Transfer Completed Interrupt and Buffer
transfer completed Status Register.
